title: ARM-TNT
description: The plugin adds new TNT types — from obsidian‑busting to high‑power variants — all customizable in strength, range, and visual effects.
body:
**ARM‑TnT** — a powerful plugin for Minecraft servers that takes explosive mechanics to the next level. It enables the creation of modified TNT blocks with unique properties, opening up vast possibilities for gameplay, building, PvP battles, and large‑scale events.

_Key Features:_
Enhanced Destructive Power
capable of destroying obsidian and other ultra‑resistant blocks;
customizable blast radius (up to catastrophic scales);
ability to completely destroy chunks upon activation.

_Versatile Applications:_
functions underwater — detonation without power loss;
interacts with pistons (can be moved and used in automated mechanisms);
remains operational in all dimensions (The Nether, The End).

_Visual Customization:_
supports custom names (you can give unique names to explosives);
allows adding lore (descriptions) to create unique lore or provide hints;
enables texture changes via resource packs.

_Special Mechanics:_
self‑replication upon destruction (optional feature);
detonation delay with a configurable timer;
selective destruction (ability to exclude certain block types).

**Commands:**
- /armtnt give <player> <tnt>

<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

# ARM-TNT Configuration
# ---------------------
# Each TNT type can be customized:
# - explosion power
# - special abilities (water detonation, obsidian breaking, etc.)
# - visual name and lore
# - destruction radius and speed


tnts:
  # 1. BIG EXPLOSION TNT
  big:
    name: "&x&F&D&0&0&0&0&lSolar Flare"
    explosion_power: 40.0
    fire: false
    lore:
      - ""
      - "&x&F&9&D&F&7&1▪ &fAbsorbed the power of the sun—explosion is 10x stronger."
      - ""
      - "&x&F&9&D&F&7&1▪ &fCan be used in advanced crafting."
      - ""


  # 2. SPAWNER-FRIENDLY TNT (50% mob preservation)
  spawner:
    name: "&x&F&2&0&C&6&5&lGentle Detonator"
    explosion_power: 4.0
    spawner_break_chance: 0.5  # 50% chance to preserve mob
    fire: false
    lore:
      - ""
      - "&x&D&1&3&1&9&F▪ &fCarefully destroys spawners."
      - "&x&D&1&3&1&9&F▪ &f50% chance to keep the mob alive."
      - ""
      - "&x&D&1&3&1&9&F▪ &fUse in specialized crafting."
      - ""


  # 3. SUPER SPAWNER TNT (100% mob preservation)
  superspawner:
    name: "&x&E&D&0&B&6&9&lBio‑Preserver"
    explosion_power: 4.0
    spawner_break_chance: 1.0  # 100% chance
    fire: false
    lore:
      - ""
      - "&x&E&5&1&1&7&5▪ &fGuaranteed mob preservation."
      - "&x&E&5&1&1&7&5▪ &fCutting‑edge biological engineering."
      - ""


  # 4. OBSIDIAN-BREAKING TNT
  obsidian:
    name: "&x&C&E&0&8&F&D&lObsidian Shatterer"
    explosion_power: 4.0
    break_obsidian: true
    radius: 3
    fire: false
    lore:
      - ""
      - "&x&D&1&0&0&F&D▪ &fDistorts space to break obsidian."
      - "&x&D&1&0&0&F&D▪ &fUseful for deep mining."
      - ""


  # 5. WATER-RESISTANT "WAVE" TNT
  volna:
    name: "&x&F&5&1&0&4&4&lWavebreaker"
    explosion_power: 60.0
    break_obsidian: true
    ignore_water: true
    radius: 4
    lore:
      - ""
      - "&x&F&D&0&0&3&E▪ &fIgnores water—explodes underwater."
      - "&x&F&D&0&0&3&E▪ &f15x explosion power, destroys obsidian."
      - "&x&F&D&0&0&3&E▪ &fPotentially craftable."
      - ""


  # 6. CHUNK-DESTRUCTION TNT
  chunk:
    name: "&x&E&4&3&7&D&4&lChunk‑Buster"
    chunk_destroy: true
    destroy_speed: 32  # blocks per second
    fire: false
    lore:
      - ""
      - "&x&E&1&0&0&F&D▪ &fDestroys entire chunks (640 b/s)."
      - "&x&E&1&0&0&F&D▪ &fIdeal for large‑scale excavation."
      - ""


</details>
